variables.name: percent underemp
variables.comment: The percentage of the population that is underemployed.

variables.name: underemployed crowding
variables.comment: The level of crowding among the unemployed.

variables.name: enterprise multiplier
variables.equation: enterprise_manager_prof_job_mult* enterprise_land_mult* enterprise_labor_job_mult* enterprise_tax_mult* enterprise_growth_mult* enterprise_factor

variables.name: labor desired construct
variables.equation: premium_housing_construct_desired* premium_housing_constr_lab+ worker_housing_const_des* worker_housing_constr_lab+ new_enterprise_construction_desired* new_enterprise_constr_lab+ low_cost_housing_constr_des* low_cost_housing_constr_lab

variables.name: manager prof arriv mult perc time
premium housing mult
variables.equation: premium_housing_adeq_mult* premium_housing_land_mult* premium_housing_pop_mult* premium_housing_tax_mult* premium_housing_enterprise_mult* premium_housing_growth_mult* premium_housing_factor

variables.name: attract migr mult
variables.equation: underemp_arr_mob_mult* underemp_housing_mult* public_expenditure_mult* underemp_job_mult* underemp_hous_prog_mult* attract_migr_factor

variables.name: worker housing mult
